name: CONTRACT-BUG-14
title: render-template.py docstring references nonexistent render-template.sh
description: scripts/render-template.py line 4 has a stale comment 'Usage (invoked by render-template.sh)'. Per spec invariant 11, no .sh files exist; Python is the sole tech stack. The .sh wrapper was deleted but the comment was not updated. Same stale pattern in scripts/check-maps-consistent.py line 4 ('invoked by check-maps-consistent.sh'), scripts/find-feature.py line 5 ('invoked by find-feature.sh'), and scripts/enforcement/check-template-schema-producer-consistency.py line 11 ('invoked by check-template-schema-producer-consistency.sh'). All four references should be removed.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of CONTRACT-BUG-12 (render-template docstring)
